title: Destrillion
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:DubrillionDestrillion-SWRSIII.jpg]] |name=Destrillion |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Myto sector/Legends|Myto sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] as defined by the [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. |sector=[[Myto sector/Legends|Myto sector]] |system=[[Dubrillion system/Legends|Dubrillion system]] |coordinates=K-3 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Veragi Trade Route/Legends|Veragi Trade Route]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain=Barren |water= |interest=[[Tibanna gas platform]]''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=None |otherspecies=*[[Yuuzhan Vong]] *[[Human/Legends|Humans]] {{C|formerly}} |socialgroup= |language=[[Yuuzhan Vong (language)|Yuuzhan Vong]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=None |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Pentastar Alignment]] *[[Imperial Remnant]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] *[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] }} {{Quote|It will be a glorious day.''"
"''And then we will turn our attention fully to the two planets of Dubrillion and Destrillion.''"
"''And then we will reach further to the core of the galaxy. The yammosk and I have foreseen it. As for those two planets, we will use them for our resource needs, and perhaps create our second base upon one.|[[Ma'Shraid]], [[Dooje Brolo]] and [[Da'Gara]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''}} '''Destrillion''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dubrillion system/Legends|Dubrillion system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], in close proximity to [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] and the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] of [[Lando's Folly]]. It was a barren world with a turbulent [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], and appeared [[Color/Legends|brown]] and dirty from [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. It also contained various energy tunnels as well as an energy field containing a [[tibanna gas platform]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],The [[Mission to Destrillion]] post-cedes the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], led by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], was sent there to [[Mission to Destrillion|investigate]] an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research facility, but found nothing but several [[TIE/hu "Hunter" Multi-Role Starfighter|TIE Hunters]] defending an Imperial supply [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]]; the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] would later discover the facility on Dubrillion. [[24 ABY/Legends|Twenty-one years later]], when [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] came to Dubrillion to find a new way to mine asteroids, he built several ore processing plants in the upper atmosphere of Destrillion. It was conquered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of the galaxy, forcing the inhabitants to evacuate to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. ==Behind the scenes== Destrillion first appeared in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|The New Jedi Order]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' {{1stp}} *''[[Rebel Force: Target]]'' {{Mo}} *{{GamerCite|9|Running the Belt}} {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' *[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *{{FactFile|103|LEI 5-8|Leisure}} *{{FactFile|105|YUU 5-8|Yuuzhan Vong Incursions}} *{{FactFile|116|CAL 19-22|Lando Calrissian}} *{{FactFile|139|WOR 1-2|Worlds of the Clone Wars}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|landocalrissian|Calrissian, Lando}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |cs=Destrillion |de=Destrillion |es=Destrillion |fr=Destrillion }} [[Category:Confederacy of Independent Systems planets]] [[Category:Dubrillion system locations]] [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Galactic Republic planets]] [[Category:Imperial Remnant planets]] [[Category:Pentastar Alignment planets]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
